landing.badge: Where will your next adventure take you?
landing.subheadline: Upload your travel bookings and let TripNest create a personalized itinerary filled with custom day-plans, restaurants, attractions, and packing checklists.
landing.stepsSubtitle: Transform your vouchers into beautiful day schedules in seconds.
landing.step1Desc: Drag and drop your flight e-ticket or hotel booking PDF/image.
landing.step2Desc: Review the fields captured by AI. Modify destination or check-in dates as needed.
landing.step3Desc: Get sightseeing timelines, packing suggestions, dining advice, and export to PDF.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Skip hours of travel forum browsing. TripNest coordinates your logistics dynamically.
landing.feature1Desc: Seamlessly extracts dates, flight PNR references, airline codes, and lodging info directly from messy documents.
landing.feature2Desc: Generates a premium timeline detailing locations, estimated costs, packing guides, and safety tips for your destination.
landing.feature3Desc: Share a read-only timeline of your trip with coordinates and booking highlights with family and friends instantly.
landing.feature4Desc: Generate high-quality multi-page PDF documents of your travel itineraries to access offline during flights.
landing.feature5Desc: Industry-grade JWT validation, hashed password controls, file extension checks, and dynamic server-side file purges.
landing.feature6Desc: Keep all your generated trip schedules indexed, sorted, searchable, and fully manageable in your dashboard.
landing.aiMagicDesc: Say goodbye to manually mapping itineraries. Upload any booking confirmation, and let Gemini construct your complete sightseeing checklist.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue planning your adventures.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your free account and start planning smarter.

dashboard.heroTitle: Where will your next adventure take you?
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Upload your flight confirmations or hotel vouchers, and let AI build a fully customized travel itinerary for your vacation.
dashboard.scanningSubtext: Gemini is structuring booking data... Please wait.
dashboard.popularSubtitle: Explore some of the world's most breathtaking travel destinations.
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Upload your travel bookings and let TripNest create a personalized, AI-powered journey schedule for you.
dashboard.tipsSubtitle: Our AI generates unique tips tailored to weather conditions, transport guidelines, and packing lists depending on how long your journey is. Upload a ticket to get started!

review.title: Review Travel Document
review.subtitle: Review extracted details and fix any OCR typos to build the perfect travel itinerary.
review.incompleteDesc: Some key information is missing. Please fill in the highlighted fields to continue with generating your itinerary.
review.missingDestination: Destination is missing. Please type a destination city.
review.missingDates: Travel dates are missing. Provide flight dates or check-in dates.
review.missingDatesHint: Missing travel dates. Provide dates to build timelines.
review.coachClassPlaceholder: e.g. AC Chair Car, Sleeper, First Class
review.generatingDesc: Google Gemini is planning sightseeing events, restaurant selections, packing requirements, and travel tips for your trip to

itinerary.publicLinkDesc: Anyone can view this travel timeline without log in credentials.

history.title: Your Travel Nest
history.subtitle: Manage and search your past AI-generated itineraries.
history.noItinerariesSearch: No itineraries match search query "{{query}}". Please check your spelling or search for another destination.
history.noItinerariesEmpty: You haven't generated any travel itineraries yet. Start planning by uploading flight tickets or booking vouchers.
history.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch past trips. Please try again.
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this trip itinerary?
